name: pump_fade_v4r_alts
description: Focused revival sweep for the repaired pump_fade v4 logic on pumpy alts only.
_comment: pump_fade_v4r revival autoresearch — pumpy alts only, v4 pattern focused.
_description: Baseline edge: pf_v4c_240d → +7.81%, PF=1.883, 19 trades, DD=3.77%.
Strategy: pump + climax exhaustion wick (large upper wick, small body)
+ volume climax at peak + price breaks below exhaustion low.
Universe: 10 pumpy alts with high intraday volatility (excl BTC/ETH/BNB which don't pump the same way).
PF_V4_PUMP_THRESHOLD_PCT  — how strong the pump must be (short window)
PF_V4_EXHAUSTION_WICK_MIN_FRAC — minimum upper wick fraction for exhaustion candle
PF_V4_PEAK_RECENT_BARS — how fresh the peak must be (staleness gate)
PF_V4_RSI_MAX — RSI ceiling at entry (must be losing momentum)
Expected trades per combo: ~8-20 over 270 days across 10 symbols.
Cooldown bug fixed in pump_fade_v4r.py (was non-functional in archive version for v4 mode).
